items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq mixed as Wall Street eyes earnings, trade tensions
items.description: Stocks slipped on Tuesday as investors braced for the next wave of corporate earnings.

items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq nudge higher as Wall Street eyes earnings, trade tensions
items.description: Wall Street regained its balance after a tumultuous week and braced for the next wave of corporate earnings.

items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures make slight gains as Wall Street eyes earnings with trade tensions ahead
items.description: US stock futures held steady as Wall Street regained its balance after a tumultuous week and braced for the next wave of corporate earnings.

items.title: Selloff? What Selloff? Monday Market Rebound
items.description: Palantir is way up after reporting Q2 results Monday afternoon, while HIMS and VRTX are way off highs.

items.title: Earnings live: Palantir stock pops on raised outlook, Hims & Hers tumbles
items.description: Second quarter earnings season is in full swing, and the results have been largely positive so far, with more positive surprises than negative ones.
